item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode, treated the three complaints as separate count-only incidents, and provided a practical root-cause and responsibility-boundary analysis. There was no triage false fire, no over-methodized stop, and no invented repeated same-means repair framing."}
